use_cases: Display FAQ sections with expandable answers
Organize feature lists with collapsible descriptions
Create help documentation with nested content sections
Build settings panels with categorized options
Implement content-dense pages with progressive disclosure
ai_summary: A clean, minimal accordion component built with Base UI that displays collapsible content sections with smooth height transitions. Features a rotating plus-to-X icon indicator, hover and focus states, and accessible keyboard navigation. Ideal for FAQ pages, documentation, or any interface requiring organized expandable content.
